Notice; For Order Permitting Discovery After Arbitration;

To Join Plaintiffs Under Unsured Automobile Motorist Carrier Amica Mutual Insurance Company
Off Calendar Mar-26-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Brian F. Kram, Esq., 507-0707, for plaintiff Michael Mitchell moving to join Plaintiff's under insured automobile motorist carrier AMICA Mutual Insurance Co. as a defendant in this action
Eunice Chang, Esq. of COLOMBATTO, KLIMENKO 391-6182, for defendant and opposing party Ya Ci Deng
Rick J. Murphy, Esq. of DRATH, CLIFFORD 510/287-4000, specially appearing for (plaintiff's automobile insurance co.) AMICA Mutual Insurance Co.

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- PLAINTIFF MICHAEL MITCHELL's motion To Join Plaintiff's Under Unsured Automobile Motorist Carrier Amica Mutual Insurance Company -- Treated as motion to amend complaint to add defendants and granted. Plaintiff has 10 days leave to file amended complaint. (DAG/301/EH) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
